case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. NANCY VUONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-15-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 66972557) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VUONG, NANCY $2,798.35 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,057.30, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-25-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
